channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] NATO → MILITARY : Fight with artillery and tanks (Dnieper River, Ukraine (general), Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: NATO / MILITARY. Location: Dnieper River, Ukraine (general), Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] INTERNATIONAL CRIMINAL COURT → ISRAEL : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: INTERNATIONAL CRIMINAL COURT / ISRAEL. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → PRESIDENT : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (New York, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: ISRAEL / PRESIDENT. Location: New York, United States. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] JORDAN → IRAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Jordan)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: JORDAN / IRAN. Location: Jordan. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: nan / TEXAS. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.
